title: Retroxidia Modded
description: Modpack enhancing vanilla gameplay with optimization mods and Create mod
body:
Discord


Our modpack contains optimization mods with visual and QoL mods. In addition vanilla-enhancement mods to make gameplay more enjoyable. Every mod in this modpack is available on Modrinth.

Create mod
  • Steam'n'Rails
  • Bells & Whistles
  • Interiors
  • Trimmed
Farmer's Delight
Adds plenty of new seeds, crops and food items. Extended with Farmer's Knifes which adds more knifes (Advanced Netherite) and Delight Storage for more kitchen related furniture.

Advanced Netherite
Great mod for better gear in endgame stage. New ingots, armors, tools and weapons with special abilities and good design.

And other mods are in this modpack!

[This modpack is made for private server]

Feel free to download and play this modpack, server-side mods are not included
